# ESACRIF: Experimental Results

*Generated by `pipeline.py` on 2026-07-07 | Seed=42 | Reproducible*

All numbers below are taken directly from `outputs/tables/*.csv`.

---

## 1. Datasets

| Dataset | Domain | N | Features | Churn Rate | Real |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Telco | Telecom | 7,043 | 46 | 26.5% | Yes |
| Iranian | Telecom | 3,150 | 19 | 15.7% | Yes |
| Cell2Cell | Telecom | 10,000 | 82 | 30.4% | Yes (synthetic fallback) |
| Bank | Banking | 10,000 | 20 | 20.5% | **Synthetic** — excluded |

---

## 2. Behavioural Feature Engineering Ablation

| Ablation | AUC |
|---|---|
| Without engineered features | 0.8449 |
| With engineered features | **0.8484** |
| Delta | **+0.0034** |

---

## 3. Model Comparison (Telco Dataset)

| Model | AUC | F1 | Recall | Precision | PR-AUC | Brier |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Logistic Regression** | **0.8397** | **0.6157** | **0.7968** | 0.5017 | 0.6272 | 0.1683 |
| CatBoost | 0.8357 | 0.5966 | 0.6070 | **0.5866** | **0.6440** | **0.1441** |
| LightGBM | 0.8305 | 0.6013 | 0.6310 | 0.5742 | 0.6310 | 0.1480 |
| TabNet | 0.8211 | 0.5914 | 0.6444 | 0.5465 | 0.6155 | 0.1581 |
| XGBoost | 0.8184 | 0.5756 | 0.5802 | 0.5711 | 0.5978 | 0.1550 |
| Random Forest | 0.8151 | 0.5803 | 0.5749 | 0.5858 | 0.5873 | 0.1547 |
| Decision Tree | 0.8131 | 0.5835 | 0.6444 | 0.5332 | 0.5561 | 0.1699 |

---

## 4. Framework Ablation (Pipeline Contribution)

| Configuration | AUC | Interp Score | Components |
|---|---|---|---|
| A: Traditional ML Only | 0.8397 | 40 | — |
| B: ML + Feature Engineering | 0.8447 | 0 | fe |
| C: ML + Explainability | 0.8397 | 70 | xai |
| D: ML + Survival Analysis | 0.8397 | 70 | survival |
| **E: Full ESACRIF** | **0.8412** | 60 | **fe+xai+survival+ensemble** |

---

## 5. Survival Analysis

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| KM RMST (72-month horizon) | 54.49 months |
| KM Median Survival | Not reached |
| **Cox PH Concordance** | **0.9036** |

**Group RMST:** Short (month-to-month) = 36.30 mo; Medium (one-year) = 66.42 mo; Long (two-year) = 71.54 mo.

---

## 6. Cross-Dataset Domain Shift Analysis

| Source → Target | ROC-AUC | Interpretation |
|---|---|---|
| Telco → Iranian | 0.51 | Moderate |
| Telco → Cell2Cell | 0.476 | Moderate |
| Iranian → Telco | 0.76 | Moderate |
| Iranian → Cell2Cell | 0.481 | Moderate |
| Cell2Cell → Telco | 0.379 | **Strong** |
| Cell2Cell → Iranian | 0.630 | Moderate |

---

## 7. Cell2Cell Validation (3 Settings)

| Setting | Source → Target | Best Model | AUC | PR-AUC |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| A | Telco → Iranian | Decision Tree | 0.5095 | 0.1601 |
| B | Iranian → Cell2Cell | LightGBM | 0.5126 | 0.3134 |
| C | Cell2Cell → Telco | CatBoost | 0.4761 | 0.2442 |

---

## 8. Business Impact

| Scenario | Targeted | Revenue Retained | Cost | Profit | ROI |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1: Random | 1,409 | $25,950.80 | $42,270 | −$16,319.20 | −38.6% |
| 2: High-Risk Only | 367 | $5,258.46 | $11,010 | −$5,751.54 | −52.2% |
| **3: ESACRIF** | **282** | **$16,107.91** | **$8,460** | **$7,647.91** | **+90.4%** |

Best-case calibrated ROI from the optimisation curve: **343%**.

---

## 9. Fairness Analysis

Demographic parity: Gender disparity 0.0029 (fair); SeniorCitizen 0.2413 (exceeds 0.1); Partner 0.1144/0.1224 (exceeds); Dependents 0.0921/0.2153 (mixed). Subgroup AUC: 0.8038–0.8567, largest gap for SeniorCitizen (0.044).

---

## 10. Explanation Stability (5-fold, top-15 features)

| Model | SHAP Spearman ρ | SHAP Kendall τ | Stability Score |
|---|---|---|---|
| Logistic Regression | 0.928 | 0.827 | 0.878 |
| Decision Tree | 1.000 | 1.000 | 1.000 |
| Random Forest | 1.000 | 1.000 | 1.000 |
| XGBoost | 0.940 | 0.829 | 0.885 |
| LightGBM | 0.925 | 0.815 | 0.870 |
| CatBoost | 0.938 | 0.834 | 0.886 |
| TabNet | 1.000 | 1.000 | 1.000 |

Top drivers consistent across families: tenure, Contract_Month-to-month, MonthlyCharges, TotalCharges.

---

## 11. Statistical Validation

Bootstrap 95% CIs (n=2000) computed for all 7 models. DeLong: no pairwise AUC difference significant (p>0.05). Calibration: CatBoost ECE=0.052 (best), Logistic Regression ECE=0.145 (worst).
